name: Demo Applicant
headline: Fictional early-career applicant used only for local workflow demos.

market_facts.work_authorization: Demo placeholder. Keep real work authorization in a private local profile.
market_facts.commute_or_relocation: Demo placeholder. Ask locally before treating commute or relocation as solved.
market_facts.mandatory_internship_proof: Demo placeholder. Treat mandatory-internship requirements as verify-first unless a private local profile confirms proof.

negative_ability_red_lines: Do not claim mandatory internship eligibility without private proof.
Do not treat an unverified commute as solved because technical fit is high.
Do not rewrite automation projects into unrelated domains without direct evidence.

experiences.title: Automation Assistant, Example Operations Team
bullets: Created a small Python workflow for cleaning sample operational data.
Documented repeatable steps so a non-technical teammate could review the output.
Prepared a demo report comparing manual and automated workflow steps.

projects.title: Demo LLM Workflow Evaluation
bullets: Built a fictional demo workflow for prompt construction, response parsing, and evaluation.
Compared model outputs with simple rubric-based checks.
Summarized results in a local Markdown report.

projects.title: Sample Data Automation Project
bullets: Cleaned a synthetic spreadsheet dataset and documented assumptions.
Used SQL queries to create small summary tables.
Kept the project scope limited to demo data and public-safe examples.

notes: This profile is fully fictional. Do not put real names, schools, languages, locations, work authorization, commute details, certificates, transcripts, or application history in tracked sample files.
Create a private profile such as profiles/me.local.json for real use.
